mdSummary:
# FileManager

Headless file and folder explorer — folder tree, breadcrumb path, list/grid views, lazy loading, inline rename, context-menu operations.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/file-manager

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FileManager | Root | `IReadOnlyList<FileSystemNode>?` | `` |  |
| FileManager | CurrentPath | `string?` | `` | The ID of the currently open folder. Null means the root level. Uses Id as the path identifier. |
| FileManager | CurrentPathChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| FileManager | LoadChildren | `Func<FileSystemNode, Task<List<FileSystemNode>>>?` | `` | Called the first time a folder is opened if its Children is null. Return the loaded children. |
| FileManager | ViewMode | `FileManagerViewMode` | `FileManagerViewMode.List` |  |
| FileManager | ViewModeChanged | `EventCallback<FileManagerViewMode>` | `` |  |
| FileManager | SelectedNode | `FileSystemNode?` | `` |  |
| FileManager | SelectedNodeChanged | `EventCallback<FileSystemNode?>` | `` |  |
| FileManager | OnFileOpen | `EventCallback<FileSystemNode>` | `` |  |
| FileManager | OnRename | `EventCallback<(FileSystemNode Node, string NewName)>` | `` |  |
| FileManager | OnDelete | `EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<FileSystemNode>>` | `` |  |
| FileManager | OnNewFolder | `EventCallback<FileSystemNode>` | `` |  |
| FileManager | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileManager | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `CurrentPathChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `ViewModeChanged` (`EventCallback<FileManagerViewMode>`)
- `SelectedNodeChanged` (`EventCallback<FileSystemNode?>`)
- `OnFileOpen` (`EventCallback<FileSystemNode>`)
- `OnRename` (`EventCallback<(FileSystemNode Node, string NewName)>`)
- `OnDelete` (`EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<FileSystemNode>>`)
- `OnNewFolder` (`EventCallback<FileSystemNode>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — ToggleTreeFolder handles Enter in FileManager.razor
- `Escape` — ToggleTreeFolder handles Escape in FileManager.razor

## Example
```razor
<FileManager />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/FileManager/FileManager.razor`
- `UI/FileManager/FileManagerModel.cs`
